reason: JWT request policy is a built-in cross-service policy branch.

from: $http defaults or interceptors that manually attach bearer tokens
reason: The policy gate evaluates before request side effects and attaches credentials only after allow decisions.

from: $http calls that manually set Cookie headers
reason: Cookie sessions should use browser-managed credentialed requests instead of user-authored Cookie headers.

from: router hooks that redirect protected routes ad hoc
to: module.config({ $security: { navigation: { rules: [{ state, decision, target }] } } })
reason: Navigation policy is evaluated before controller and view lifecycle work starts.
